title: Livelymine
description: This modpack improves Minecraft. You will get more variety in your survival.
body:
## **Video trailer:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-6tgHeOlIJI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **Description:**
This mod pack will change your Minecraft and add new experiences to it. Everything has been changed, starting with the generation of the world: Overworld, Nezer and End, ending with a "couple" of new bosses. New animals and birds, swords and other various items have also been added. The Biomes O' Plenty mod will add many new biomes, Quark will diversify the game with a large number of items and decorations. Archaeology will get better with the Better Archeology mod. In the modpack, you can customize elites, ride a sniffer and craft an underwater torch, wearing full turtle armor. There are also many visual and audio mods in fashion. Visual ones, such as Not Enough Animations, will add new animations to the player. Sound mods, such as AmbientSounds, will create a pleasant atmosphere thanks to the new ambient sounds. Better Combat and SwordBlockingMechanics will bring a new fighting game to the game. With Farmer's Delight, you can cook a lot of new, delicious food. And Alex's Mobs and Naturalist will spawn a lot of new mobs. Nyf's Spiders will make spiders scarier, and in the meantime, Traveler's Titles will not let you forget which biome you are in. The guards from Guard Villagers will look after you while you are in the village. The Kobolds mod will also add a whole new race of underground inhabitants.
## **Links**:
